title: sclarea syriaca
intro: Sclarea syriaca, also known as Syrian scabious, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sclarea syriaca include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote wound healing. Sclarea syriaca can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in essential oil form to reap its medicinal benefits.
